description: Per-run JSON schema for Block D-prime sweep result files. Every Phase 1c-Lean trainer run emits one JSON document conforming to this schema, recording the six §18.11 audit-trail items.

code_version_hash.description: Output of `git rev-parse --short HEAD` at trainer-launch time. Provides one-step audit hook from any result JSON back to the exact commit of the loss formulation that produced it.

loss_formulation.spec_reference: SPEC §17.5 item 2 / §18.11 item 2 (canonicalised v0.3 → v0.3.1, DEV-1c-lean-005)
loss_formulation.description: Canonical Phase 1c-Lean loss-formulation identifier. Locked at SPEC v0.3.1 (Block C-prime halt-1) per DEV-1c-lean-005. Matches the Block B-prime committed string at tag `phase1c-lean-g2-lean-passed`.

preflight_summary_block.description: Records pre-flight invariant checks and key magnitudes so the result JSON is self-contained for retrospective inspection. Phase 1c-Lean addition: σ_VV and σ_VH values computed at init.

sigma_vv.description: Per-channel L_physics normalisation scale factor for VV at training init (SPEC §18.4.1). Computed once at random-init forward pass over training set.

sigma_vh.description: Per-channel L_physics normalisation scale factor for VH at training init (SPEC §18.4.1). Computed once at random-init forward pass over training set.

vv_vh_magnitude_ratio.description: F-2b empirical ratio for sanity checking. Phase 1b reference: ~0.645.

structural_prediction_at_kickoff.description: Brief textual statement of the expected outcome category (Strong / Significant / Moderate / Inconclusive / HALT) per pre-registered analysis.

wall_clock_estimate_seconds.description: Per-rep training wall-clock estimate. Phase 1c-Lean envelope (§18.10): 30–90 s.

sleep_wake_event_count.description: Count of sleep/wake events from `pmset -g log` over the run window. Non-zero counts flag the run for re-execution per SPEC §18.10 operational discipline.

dominance_verdict_per_run.description: Dominance verdict per (λ_VV, λ_VH, rep_idx) tuple, encoding §9 dominance criterion outcome.

config_idx.description: Flat config_idx ∈ [0, 107] per SPEC §18.6.2 v0.3.2: config_idx = 18 * λ_VV_idx + 3 * λ_VH_idx + rep_idx.

satisfies_dominance.description: Binary §9 dominance verdict for this (λ, rep) tuple.

margin_to_threshold_pct.description: Percentage distance to the §9 dominance threshold. Negative means satisfies; positive means below threshold by that percentage.

sigma_scale_factors.description: σ scale factors logged separately from the model checkpoint for downstream auditability.

sigma_vv.description: Same value as preflight_summary_block.sigma_vv; logged separately for explicit audit-trail.

sigma_vh.description: Same value as preflight_summary_block.sigma_vh; logged separately for explicit audit-trail.

computation_method.description: Per SPEC §18.4.1 implementation requirement: σ_VV and σ_VH computed once at training initialisation as the standard deviation of the unweighted physics losses over the training set's first forward pass at randomly initialised network weights. Per-batch normalisation is explicitly out of scope per §18.4.1.
